positive: A complex, highly stylized celestial and botanical fusion illustration. Depict a majestic, glowing crescent moon nestled amongst stylized, bioluminescent flowering vines and cosmic nebulae clouds. The composition should feature a central, dynamic arrangement with strong, clean silhouettes for easy apparel printing. Use a vibrant palette of deep indigo, ethereal teal, cosmic purple, and glowing gold accents. Focus on intricate, repeating patterns (mandala-like elements) within the botanical structures and stellar forms. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau engraving and vaporwave psychedelia, emphasizing sharp contrast, defined line work, and geometric symmetry. Minimal shading, maximum visual impact, perfect for repeat tiling or central placement on fabric.
negative: blurry, noisy, grainy, text, watermark, signature, out-of-focus, low detail, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, human, realistic photography, messy
